summary: PRED-105 verdict-advancement to tacit_withdrawal staged — re-assign at next poll once d>=14 confirmed
detail: Per chg-20260501-2305-001 the d=14 tacit_withdrawal threshold for PRED-105 hits at 2026-05-02T12:02Z (~8h after this analyst run, ~5h before the next ~12h poll). At this run the threshold was NOT yet breached (d~13.7), so verdict was held at silent_ignore. Pre-staged advancement rationale lives in monitor/analysis/2026-05-02T0400-chg-20260501-2305-001.json under pred_105_assessment.pre_staged_advancement_rationale (three grounds: dome has its own adjudication taxonomy and 14d to use it; auto-pipeline is alive so silence is policy; FAIL-009 already tracks PRED-105). Action requested: at the next poll that confirms d>=14 with PRED-105 still labelled PENDING-PROSPECTIVE on predictions.html (no goalpost-move, no removal), re-assign PRED-105 to analyst Mode 1b for verdict update. The Mode 1b dispatcher condition is verdict===null which is not currently met (verdict===silent_ignore) — re-assignment is needed via assigned-analyst issue or by setting verdict to null in data/predictions.json (preferred: assigned-analyst issue so verdict_history is preserved). If the pre-staged rationale survives the next poll unchanged, the analyst Mode 1b run can write a one-paragraph PRED-assessment-PRED-105 update lifting the rationale text.
trigger_condition: next-poll d>=14 AND predictions.html still byte-identical AND PRED-105 still PENDING-PROSPECTIVE
fallback_if_dome_acts: If the next poll shows the dome adjudicating PRED-105 (PASS/FAIL/REFINED) or removing it, do NOT advance to tacit_withdrawal — instead trigger normal Mode 1b verdict update with the actual dome outcome and apply the post-closure rubric in PRED-105.notes.
